description.value: Material Design component framework for Vue.js

styling-approach.comment: Vuetify uses SCSS/Sass for styling with customizable SASS variables

component-model.comment: Fully styled Material Design components ready to use

typescript.comment: Written in TypeScript (55.2% of codebase) with first-class type definitions

ssr-compatible.comment: Full SSR support with official Nuxt module, requires manual SSR option configuration

dark-mode.comment: Built-in light and dark theme variants with dynamic switching support

theming-system.comment: Comprehensive theming system with customizable colors, typography, and spacing

css-variables.comment: Generates CSS variables for each theme color when customProperties is enabled

design-tokens.comment: SASS variables serve as design tokens for colors, typography, and spacing

rtl-support.comment: Built-in RTL support via rtl prop, includes Arabic and other RTL language translations

text-input.comment: v-text-field with variants for password, email, search, etc.

slider.comment: v-slider with single and dual-thumb support via v-range-slider

number-input.comment: v-text-field with type='number' and increment/decrement controls

tag-input.comment: v-combobox with chips/multiple prop for tag input functionality

date-picker.comment: v-date-picker with portrait/landscape orientation, multiple date selection

date-range-picker.comment: v-date-picker with range prop for date range selection

dropzone.comment: No dedicated drag-and-drop dropzone component, can be built with v-file-input and custom dropzone logic

rating-input.comment: v-rating component with star and custom icon support

input-groups.comment: Text fields support prepend/append icons, text, and buttons via slots

input-with-dropdown.comment: Can combine v-text-field with v-menu for custom dropdown inputs

split-button.comment: Can build split button with v-btn-group and v-menu

data-table.comment: v-data-table with sorting, filtering, pagination, inline editing, row selection

virtual-infinite-list.comment: v-virtual-scroll for virtualized lists and v-infinite-scroll for infinite scrolling

tree-view.comment: v-treeview component, but lacks virtual scrolling support for large trees

avatar.comment: v-avatar with circular and tile variants

tag-chip-pill.comment: v-chip component with closable and clickable variants

calendar.comment: Date picker provides calendar UI for selection but no dedicated month/week calendar view component

alert.comment: v-alert with contextual types (success, info, warning, error)

toast-notification.comment: v-snackbar component with positioning and customizable duration

skeleton.comment: v-skeleton-loader with 30+ pre-defined types and combinable patterns

empty-state.comment: v-empty-state component for empty lists and no search results

drawer-sheet.comment: v-navigation-drawer with permanent, temporary, and mini-variant modes

popover.comment: v-menu can be used as popover with anchor positioning

context-menu.comment: v-menu with custom positioning for right-click context menu behavior

command-palette.comment: No dedicated command palette component, can be built with v-dialog, v-text-field, and v-list

navigation-menu.comment: v-list with nested v-list-group for dropdown navigation menus

grid.comment: 12-point grid system with v-container, v-row, v-col

stack.comment: v-row and v-col with flex utilities for stacking

divider.comment: v-divider with horizontal and vertical orientation

resizable.comment: No built-in resizable component, requires third-party libraries like vue-multipane

splitter.comment: No built-in splitter/split pane component, requires third-party libraries

rich-text-editors.comment: No official rich text editor integrations documented

code-editors.comment: No official code editor integrations documented

chart-libraries.comment: No official chart library integrations; HighCharts commonly used in Vuetify templates

form-libraries.comment: Official examples for vee-validate and vuelidate integration, built-in validation via rules prop

animation-libraries.comment: Built-in transitions and animations via Vue's transition system

icon-libraries.comment: Built-in support for Material Icons (default), MDI, Font Awesome 4/5

date-libraries.comment: Built-in date handling; date-fns, dayjs, luxon, and moment available as dev dependencies for testing

aria-compliant.comment: Components follow WAI-ARIA patterns with ARIA attributes

keyboard-navigation.comment: Full keyboard support for interactive components

screen-reader-tested.comment: Screen reader testing infrastructure with a11y_status_checks_ruleset, though some historical issues reported

focus-management.comment: Proper focus trapping in modals and focus restoration

wcag-level.comment: No specific WCAG compliance level documented; aims for ARIA compliance but level unspecified

accessibility-rating.comment: ARIA-compliant with keyboard navigation and screen reader support, but some documented accessibility gaps in components like v-select and v-menu

bundle-size-full.comment: 51.7 KB minified, 18.2 KB gzipped for full bundle

bundle-size-core.comment: Tree-shakeable library; actual size depends on components imported

tree-shakeable.comment: Automatic tree-shaking via vuetify-loader; components are individually importable ES modules

zero-runtime.comment: Includes JavaScript runtime for components and theming

lazy-loading.comment: Components can be lazy loaded on demand with proper bundler configuration

documentation-quality.comment: Excellent documentation with interactive examples, API reference, guides, and playground

interactive-docs.comment: Documentation includes interactive component playground and live examples

storybook.comment: Official Storybook recipe and example repository for Vuetify 3 integration

figma-kit.comment: Official Vuetify 3 UI Kit for Figma (free and pro editions)

cli-generator.comment: Vutify official scaffolding tool and vue-cli-plugin-vuetify-cli for component generation

active-maintenance.comment: Active development with 626 releases, latest v3.11.4 on December 16, 2025

commercial-support.comment: Professional support services with multiple tiers, consulting, dedicated chat support, and GitHub issue prioritization

style-override.comment: Supports class override, inline styles via style prop, and CSS variables for theming

compound-components.comment: Many components use composable sub-components (v-list/v-list-item, v-card/v-card-title, etc.)

render-props.comment: Extensive slot support for customization (Vue's scoped slots)

slots.comment: Named slots throughout components for content injection (Vue's native slot system)

unstyled-mode.comment: No unstyled/headless mode; components ship with Material Design styles
